name: AI Reasoning Demo — Claude Chain-of-Thought to Slack
description: Takes a question or problem, uses Claude AI with explicit chain-of-thought reasoning to work through it step by step, and posts the full reasoning process plus conclusion to Slack with Block Kit formatting.

source.originalName: DeepSeek V3 chat & R1 reasoning quick start

slackChannel.description: Slack channel ID to post the reasoning output

question.description: Question or problem for chain-of-thought reasoning (e.g. 'What are the pros and cons of microservices vs monolith?')

reasoningDepth.description: Reasoning depth: quick, thorough, or exhaustive

steps.name: Parse Claude output and strip code fences
Build Slack Block Kit reasoning output
